name: @arielgonzaguer/michi-router
description:
El router minimalista y simple para React.
El objetivo principal de esta herramienta es proporcionar la funcionalidad básica de enrutamiento.

scripts.build:bundle: npm run clean && tsup src/index.ts src/core.ts src/protected.ts --format esm,cjs --minify --dts --out-dir dist --external react --splitting false
scripts.prepublish: npm run build:bundle && npm test && npm run size:check
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm publish --access public && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm publish --access public && git push origin main --tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major && npm publish --access public && git push origin main --tags

author: Ariel Gonzales Agüero
